ddls:
CREATE TABLE "player" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "team" TEXT /* Current team of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "height" TEXT /* Height of the player */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the player */,
  "college" TEXT /* College the player attended */,
  "draft_year" INTEGER /* Year the player was drafted */,
  "draft_round" INTEGER /* Round in which the player was drafted */,
  "draft_pick" INTEGER /* Pick number in the draft */,
  "contract_expiration" INTEGER /* Year the player's current contract expires */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the team is based */,
  "stadium" TEXT /* Name of the stadium */,
  "coach" TEXT /* Name of the head coach */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "week" INTEGER /* Week of the game */,
  "home_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the home team */,
  "away_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the away team */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date of the game */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the game (e.g., W 33-30, L 3-40) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "opponent_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the opponent team */,
  "snaps_played" TEXT /* Number of snaps played by the player */,
  "snaps_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of snaps played by the player */,
  "receiving_targets" INTEGER /* Number of receiving targets */,
  "receiving_receptions" INTEGER /* Number of receiving receptions */,
  "receiving_yards" INTEGER /* Number of receiving yards */,
  "receiving_yards_per_reception" REAL /* Yards per receiving reception */,
  "receiving_tds" INTEGER /* Number of receiving touchdowns */,
  "rushing_attempts" INTEGER /* Number of rushing attempts */,
  "rushing_yards" INTEGER /* Number of rushing yards */,
  "rushing_tds" INTEGER /* Number of rushing touchdowns */,
  "fumbles" INTEGER /* Number of fumbles */,
  "fantasy_points" REAL /* Fantasy points scored by the player */,
  "rank" TEXT /* Player's rank (if applicable, can be null) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id")
)
column_names: Date of birth of the player
Round in which the player was drafted
Year the player's current contract expires
City where the team is based
Result of the game (e.g., W 33-30, L 3-40)
Unique identifier for each performance record
Number of snaps played by the player
Percentage of snaps played by the player
Fantasy points scored by the player
Player's rank (if applicable, can be null)
